title: Soft-delete with partial index + active query scope + soft_delete_changeset
prompt: Complete soft-delete support for MyApp.Accounts.Member (starting from test_fixtures/soft_delete_missing_scope.ex): (1) schema must have deleted_at field, unique_constraint with explicit `name: :members_email_active_index`, (2) helper `active_query/0` using is_nil, (3) `soft_delete_changeset/1` that sets deleted_at to DateTime.utc_now |> DateTime.truncate(:second), (4) migration creating the partial unique index with that explicit name. Schema to lib/my_app/accounts/member.ex, migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260413600000_add_partial_unique_members.exs.
tier_rationale: Four coordinated changes with the crucial partial-index + name-match between migration and changeset. Hard because any missing piece breaks the whole flow.
research_citation: Dashbit — Soft deletes with Ecto and PostgreSQL.
